summary:
The McRoberts maneuver causes sharp hyperflexion of the hips, increasing pressure on the obturator nerve due to its location within the adductor canal and proximity to the anterior pelvic wall. This positional stress makes the obturator nerve most likely affected among the choices considered.  

$\boxed{B}$

$\boxed{B}$. Answer choice: B
